title: [The Celadon Thread]
description: Bundles of leafy cuttings, fragrant twigs, and dried blossoms are stacked neatly upon wooden shelves lining the wagon's curved walls, their mingled scents creating a warm and earthy redolence that fills the air.  A counter of bark-edged walnut, bisected by a vein of dried azure resin, anchors the space with a sense of balance as it displays wares for sale.  Beneath it, additional goods peek out from large woven baskets stacked side by side.
